summary: Tuesday, May 27, 2025 Location: Borough Assembly Chambers 6:00 PM CALL TO ORDER a. PLEDGE OF ALLEGIANCE led by Assembly Member Robbins b. ROLL CALL CEREMONIAL MATTERS PERSONS TO BE HEARD a. title: AST Driving Under The Influence: McGrath [AK25050505]
summary: On 05/26/2025, Alaska Wildlife Troopers contacted Damion Magnuson, age 29 of McGrath, after he was observed driving a motor vehicle to a community event. Investigation determined Magnuson had operated his vehicle while under the influence of alcohol. Magnuson was released to a sober party and was subsequently charged with DUI.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Assault 4th, Assault in the Presence of a Child x2: Mentasta [AK25050905]
incident_type: Assault 4th, Assault in the Presence of a Child x2
summary: On May 28, 2025, at 0501 hours Alaska State Troopers in Tok responded to a report of an assault at a residence in Mentasta Lake. Investigation resulted in the arrest of Drew Patrick, age 43 of Mentasta, for one count of Assault in the Fourth Degree and two counts of Assault in the Presence of a Chil...
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Death Investigation: Bulchitna Lake [AK25050102]
summary: On May 25, 2025, the Alaska State Troopers were notified that human remains were located near Bulchitna Lake in the Mat-Su Valley. On May 26, 2025, Wildlife Troopers flew to the remote location and recovered the remains and conducted a preliminary death investigation, which determined that foul play...
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Death Investigation: Fairbanks [AK25050854]
summary: On May 28th, 2025, at approximately 0030 hours, Troopers responded to Chena Point Ave in Fairbanks for a report of CPR in progress. HM reported her husband, Frank Mikesell, had collapsed and was cold to the touch. EMS arrived and attempted life-saving measures, but Frank was pronounced dead at 0107....
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Trespass: Fairbanks [AK25050828]
summary: On 05/27/2025 at approximately 2146 hours, the Alaska State Trooper received a report of a trespass. Troopers' investigation determined that Jennifer Lofrano committed the crime of criminal trespass in the 2nd degree. Jennifer was arrested and transported to FCC.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch
